ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number in the catalog */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the track was released */,
  "recording_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of recording */,
  "matrix_number" TEXT /* Matrix number of the track */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track in minutes and seconds */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the track */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the track */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating of the track */,
  "ISRC" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_recording_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_type_id") REFERENCES recording_types ("recording_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_types" (
  "recording_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording type */,
  "recording_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the recording type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recording type */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the recording type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the label was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_labels" (
  "track_label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track-label association */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was distributed by the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_labels_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_labels_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the track */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the track was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Browser or device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track version */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the audio file of the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_versions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used to search for tracks */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "result_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Time taken to perform the search */,
  "filters_used" TEXT /* Applied filters in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
